# DevTools Hub

> Free online developer & web tools that run entirely in your browser. Fast, private, no data sent to servers. Available in 7 languages.

DevTools Hub provides 20 browser-based utilities for developers, writers, and content creators. All tools execute client-side using JavaScript — no data ever leaves the user's device.

## Tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/json-formatter): Format, validate, and minify JSON data with syntax highlighting and error detection
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/base64): Encode and decode Base64 strings with full UTF-8 support
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/url-encoder): Encode and decode URL components using encodeURIComponent or encodeURI
- [Hash Generator](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/hash-generator): Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, and SHA-512 hashes using the Web Crypto API
- [UUID Generator](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/uuid-generator): Generate cryptographically random UUID v4 identifiers in bulk
- [Unix Timestamp Converter](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/timestamp-converter): Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates in multiple formats
- [Password Generator](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/password-generator): Generate secure random passwords with configurable length and character sets
- [QR Code Generator](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/qr-code): Create QR codes from text or URLs with custom colors, sizes, and error correction levels
- [JWT Decoder](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/jwt-decoder): Decode and inspect JSON Web Token headers, payloads, and expiration status
- [Regex Tester](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with live matching, highlighting, and common pattern presets
- [Text Inspector](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/text-inspector): Count characters, words, lines, and bytes; view Unicode code points and UTF-8/UTF-16 encoding details
- [Password Hasher](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/password-hasher): Hash passwords with Argon2id or PBKDF2-SHA256 with configurable salt, iterations, and memory cost via WebAssembly
- [Test Data Generator](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/test-data-generator): Generate random strings, emails, names, dates, IPs, phone numbers, Lorem Ipsum, and JSON for testing
- [Diff Checker](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/diff-checker): Compare two texts side by side with highlighted additions, deletions, and unchanged lines
- [Halfwidth/Fullwidth Converter](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/halfwidth-fullwidth): Convert between halfwidth (hankaku) and fullwidth (zenkaku) characters including ASCII, numbers, and katakana
- [HTML Tag Stripper](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/html-strip): Remove HTML tags from text and extract clean plain text content with entity decoding
- [Keyword Counter](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/keyword-counter): Count specific keyword occurrences in text with case-sensitive option, ideal for SEO and content analysis
- [PDF Line Break Remover](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/pdf-line-break-remover): Remove unwanted line breaks from text copied from PDF documents while preserving paragraphs
- [Markdown Preview](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/markdown-preview): Write Markdown and see live rendered preview with HTML export, supporting tables, code blocks, and more
- [Color Picker](https://devtools-hub.vercel.app/en/color-picker): Pick colors with HEX/RGB/HSL conversion, shade palette generation, color harmonies, and WCAG contrast checking

## Languages

Available in English, Japanese (日本語), Korean (한국어), German (Deutsch), French (Français), Spanish (Español), and Portuguese (Português).

## Technical Details

- Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS 4
- All processing happens client-side in the browser
- No cookies, no tracking, no server-side data storage
- Static site generation (SSG) for fast loading
- Works offline after initial load
- Security headers configured (X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy)
